case_title: BANK OF THE WEST VS. KEYSTONE MEDICAL CENTERS LLC DBA DIAGNOSTIC et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT (EQUIPMENT VALUATION) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE CONTRACT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES ONE THROUGH TEN, INCLUSIVE

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KEYSTONE MEDICAL CENTERS LLC DBA DIAGNOSTIC IMAGING CENTER PERKINS, RONALD C. POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: DRYPRO LASER IMAGER;LAN CONNECTIVITY PACKAGE., OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $24,846.12 DAMAGES, $2,825.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $403.50 COSTS, $449.46 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $28,524.08, EQIUPMENT HAS A FAIR MARKET VALUE OF $10,000.00. SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST SERVED OCT-29-2005, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KEYSTONE MEDICAL CENTERS LLC DBA DIAGNOSTIC IMAGING CENTER

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $403.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT KEYSTONE MEDICAL CENTERS LLC DBA DIAGNOSTIC IMAGING CENTER PERKINS, RONALD C.
